description: Allow developers to optionally bring their own dotfiles repository to customize their shell and IDE settings!

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: default_dotfiles_branch
variables.description: The default dotfiles branch if the workspace user does not provide one

variables.name: default_dotfiles_uri
variables.description: The default dotfiles URI if the workspace user does not provide one

variables.name: description
variables.description: Custom description for the dotfiles parameter shown in the UI.
variables.default: Enter a URL for a [dotfiles repository](https://dotfiles.github.io) to personalize your workspace. Use an SSH URL (e.g. `git@host:user/repo`) if your Git provider restricts HTTPS cloning.

variables.name: dotfiles_branch
variables.description: Branch to use for the dotfiles repository.

variables.name: dotfiles_uri
variables.description: The URL to a dotfiles repository. (optional, when set, the user isn't prompted for their dotfiles)

variables.name: manual_update
variables.description: If true, this adds a button to workspace page to refresh dotfiles on demand.

variables.name: post_clone_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after applying dotfiles.

variables.name: user
variables.description: The name of the user to apply the dotfiles to. (optional, applies to the current user by default)
